title: The Ant and the Grasshopper
synopsis: A busy ant works through the warm season while a grasshopper sings and plays. A story about planning ahead.
sentences: On a bright summer day, an Ant worked hard near her little home.
She carried grain again and again, building a safe store for the cold months.
Nearby, a Grasshopper jumped through the field and sang cheerful songs.
He laughed when he saw the Ant working under the hot sun.
"Why do you work so much?" he asked.
"Come and sing with me. The day is beautiful."
The Ant replied, "I am getting ready for winter, when food will be hard to find."
But the Grasshopper only played, danced, and sang from morning until night.
Soon, summer ended and the cold wind of winter arrived.
The field turned bare, and the Grasshopper could not find any food.
Hungry and tired, he went to the Ant's home and asked for help.
The Ant shared a little food but reminded him that a wise friend prepares before trouble comes.
